info.title: FeedTheRealm Core Service API

get.description: Retrieves a list of all cosmetic categories.

post.description: Creates a new cosmetic category globally.

get.description: Retrieves a list of cosmetics that belong to a specific category ID.

put.description: Upload a cosmetic form-data payload containing category ID and cosmetic file.

get.description: Retrieves a single cosmetic item by its ID.

delete.description: Delete a specific cosmetic by ID (requires ownership)

get.description: Retrieves a list of all item categories.

post.description: Creates a new item category globally.

get.description: Retrieves an items list specific to a world ID and category ID.
get.summary: Get items by world and category

put.description: Upload item IDs alongside sprite files mapping to a world and category.

get.description: Retrieves a single item item by its ID.

delete.description: Delete a specific item by ID (requires ownership)

get.description: Retrieve the metadata models available in a given world id.

put.description: Submit multiple custom models bounded to a specific world.

parameters.description: Multipart upload array for model bindings
parameters.name: models

get.description: Serves the HTML form for admin login.

post.description: Processes admin login form submission, sets a JWT cookie, and redirects to Swagger UI.

get.description: Validates the integrity and expiration of an active token.

post.description: Authenticates a user and returns an access token.
Generates and sends a new verification code to the user's email.
Creates a new user account with the provided email and password.
Verifies a user's email address with a provided verification code.
Creates a checkout session URL to purchase a gem pack.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's gem balance. Creates one if missing.

put.description: Updates gem balance for a user. Admin only.

get.description: Returns all available gem packs.

post.description: Creates a new gem pack. Admin only.

get.description: Returns details for a specific gem pack.

put.description: Updates an existing gem pack. Admin only.

delete.description: Deletes a gem pack by ID. Admin only.

post.description: Processes Stripe webhook events for completed payments.

get.description: Retrieves character metadata for the session player or a target UUID.

patch.description: Updates the name, bio, and associated sprites map.

get.description: Retrieves character metadata for the session player or a target UUID.
Generates paginated meta-list of standard player-made worlds.

post.description: Create a new world instance in the registry.

get.description: Returns resolved dynamically routed TCP/UDP IP and Port mappings for client connections.
Init an orchestrator game server container to map back to this World and Zone chunk.
Stop local processing chunk container linked to orchestrator mapping.

delete.description: Purge utility used carefully during development to wipe all tables.

post.description: Publishes or updates a zone for a world by world_id and zone_id.

get.description: Fetches full world payload and configuration data by passing the world ID.

put.description: Changes the underlying data mappings and description values of an owned world instance.

delete.description: Delete a world permanently. Requires ownership.

get.description: Returns all available zone IDs for a specific world.
